x-enumeration-literals.name: CandidateSelection
x-enumeration-literals.description: The initial selection and confirmation of prospects (candidate lists) that are to be included in the campaign

x-enumeration-literals.name: Execution
x-enumeration-literals.description: Execution of the prospect interaction, presenting the campaign details, recording the prospect response

x-enumeration-literals.name: AnalysisFeedback
x-enumeration-literals.description: Analyzing the impact of the campaign and providing feedback to help refine/recalibrate the campaign specification
